sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ الْمُوَظَّفُونَ فِي مَكْتَبِنَا كَفَرِيقٍ وَاحِدٍ لِتَحْقِيقِ الْأَهْدَافِ.
sentences.translation: Zaposlenici u našem uredu rade kao jedan tim radi postizanja ciljeva.
sentences.translationEn: The employees in our office work as one team to achieve goals.

sentences.arabic: نَتَبَادَلُ الْأَفْكَارَ وَنُسَاعِدُ بَعْضَنَا بَعْضاً فِي الْمَهَامِّ الصَّعْبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Razmjenjujemo ideje i pomažemo jedni drugima u teškim zadacima.
sentences.translationEn: We exchange ideas and help each other with difficult tasks.

sentences.arabic: التَّعَاوُنُ يَجْعَلُ الْعَمَلَ أَكْثَرَ سُهُولَةً وَمُتْعَةً لِلْجَمِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Saradnja čini posao lakšim i zabavnijim za sve.
sentences.translationEn: Cooperation makes work easier and more enjoyable for everyone.
